sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6657" key="a)nakai/nwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνακαίν-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n6657.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀνακαίνισις</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg006.perseus-grc1:12:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ep.Rom.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.2</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Tit.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
